title: 9 redundant logging wrappers -- consolidate domain-specific Write-*Log functions to Write-CronLog -Source
description: At least 9 modules define their own Write-*Log wrapper functions (Write-AppLog, Write-ScanLog, Write-PipeLog, etc.) that ultimately call Write-CronLog. This violates DRY and makes severity-level changes require edits in 9+ places. Consolidate: each module should directly call Write-CronLog -Severity ... -Source 'ModuleName' instead of wrapping. Advisory SEMI-SIN SS-003 (Write-Host in modules) may also apply to some wrappers.
notes: Use: Select-String -Path modules/*.psm1,agents/**/*.psm1 -Pattern 'function Write-' to get full list. Severity values must be: Emergency, Alert, Critical, Error, Warning, Notice, Informational, Debug (NOT 'INFO').
